hero.label: Made for JustAI
hero.headline: I'll help JustAI grow from 5 to 50 customers.
hero.subheadline: I interned at NextAfter, a B2B digital fundraising consultancy where I ran A/B tests on messaging campaigns for nonprofit clients. JustAI's 'always-on testing' vision is exactly what I was doing manually — I want to help sell that vision.

whyCompany.title: I understand A/B testing at scale
whyCompany.body: At NextAfter, I ran messaging experiments for 10+ nonprofit clients. JustAI's dynamic testing platform solves a problem I've felt firsthand — I can speak to prospects' pain authentically.

whyCompany.title: Marketing + sales hybrid
whyCompany.body: I've done both sides: content and campaign work at NextAfter, outbound prospecting and pipeline generation at Copygen.ai. This 'Growth & Marketing Lead' role fits exactly at that intersection.

whyCompany.title: Early-stage operator mindset
whyCompany.body: Neha built retention at Pinterest and Twitter. She knows what growth at scale looks like. I want to be the scrappy operator who helps JustAI get there — not afraid of unscalable things that work.

quote: I ran A/B tests manually at NextAfter for weeks to prove what JustAI does automatically. Selling that story is personal for me.
